title: Police officer arrested for drugs at George Court
description: GEORGE NEWS - An on-duty police officer who...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - An on-duty police officer who works at the George Court was arrested earlier today, Monday 24 March, after he was allegedly smuggling drugs into the building.


> It is believed that the drugs were intended for one or more of the detainees who appeared in court today.


He is yet to appear in court after his arrest.

A media enquiry has been sent to the police for comment. We are awaiting their response.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
